summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CotizaBot Portal Cliente, Empresa/Facturama, and Twilio WhatsApp configuration features. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Portal Cliente error handling, Mi Empresa profile page, Datos Fiscales form, and WhatsApp configuration page.

minor.issue: Facturama sandbox credentials may return 401 - invoice requests are processed but CFDI generation may fail. Fallback email notification is sent.

critical_code_review_comments: Portal Cliente uses public tokens without authentication - correct implementation for sharing quotations
Facturama integration properly handles sandbox/production modes with fallback email notification
Twilio WhatsApp configuration correctly requires Plan Completo before allowing number purchase
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
SAT fiscal catalogs (regímenes fiscales, usos CFDI) are correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: Multiple invoice requests created during testing (TEST-REF-* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal Cliente, Empresa/Facturama, and Twilio WhatsApp configuration features fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_portal_empresa_twilio.py cover: Portal Cliente (invalid token handling, PDF download, link generation), Empresa catalogos (regímenes fiscales, usos CFDI), Empresa perfil (get/update profile, datos fiscales), Solicitar Factura (auth required, fiscal data validation, invoice request), Twilio (ciudades, mi-numero, estado-configuracion, buscar-numeros, configurar-whatsapp). Frontend tests verified: Portal Cliente error page with invalid token, Login flow, Dashboard navigation, WhatsApp configuration page (Plan Completo requirement), Mi Empresa page (logo upload, company info, datos fiscales form, solicitar factura button, historial de solicitudes).

backend: POST /api/portal/generar-enlace - Requires cotizacion_id and empresa_id params
GET /api/empresa/perfil - Requires auth, returns empresa profile
GET /api/empresa/datos-fiscales - Requires auth, returns fiscal data
POST /api/empresa/solicitar-factura - Requires auth, processes invoice request
GET /api/twilio/ciudades - Requires auth, returns 10 Mexican cities
GET /api/twilio/mi-numero - Requires auth, returns WhatsApp number status
frontend: Portal Cliente - Error page displays correctly for invalid token
Portal Cliente - 'Enlace no válido' message shown
Portal Cliente - 'Ir a CotizaExpress' button visible
Login flow - Form submission and redirect to dashboard
Dashboard - All navigation items visible (Dashboard, Cotizaciones, WhatsApp, Mi Empresa)
WhatsApp Configuration - Plan Completo requirement message displayed
WhatsApp Configuration - 'Ver Plan Completo - $1,000 MXN/mes' button visible
Mi Empresa - Logo upload section visible
Mi Empresa - Company info form (nombre, RFC, teléfono, email, dirección)
Mi Empresa - Datos Fiscales form (RFC, razón social, régimen fiscal, uso CFDI, código postal, email facturas)
Mi Empresa - 'Solicitar Factura CFDI' button visible and enabled
Mi Empresa - Historial de Solicitudes showing previous requests

integration_notes.facturama: Sandbox credentials (DistribucionesArobe/Beltran92) may return 401. Invoice requests are logged and fallback email notification is sent to contacto@arobegroup.com
integration_notes.resend_email: Domain cotizaexpress.com not verified - fallback to onboarding@resend.dev
integration_notes.twilio: Credentials configured (ACac9ca1438699c556cf97342cbf422ca5). WhatsApp number purchase requires Plan Completo
